records.question: Which drivers named Timothy Ackert are at least 35 years old, from Coventry, and belong to the Rep party?

records.pred_sql: SELECT Driver_ID FROM driver WHERE Name = 'Timothy Ackert' AND Age >= 35 AND Home_city = 'Coventry' AND Party = 'Rep'

records.question: Which drivers named Jason Rojas, who are Democrats at least 38 years old and live in East Hartford, drive school buses for private colleges?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
JOIN school ON school_bus.school_id = school.school_id
WHERE driver.party = 'Dem' AND driver.name = 'Jason Rojas' AND school.grade = 'College' AND driver.age >= 38 AND driver.home_city = 'East Hartford' AND school.type = 'Private'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT driver.Driver_ID
FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.Driver_ID = school_bus.Driver_ID
JOIN school ON school_bus.School_ID = school.School_ID
WHERE driver.Name = 'Jason Rojas'
  AND driver.Party = 'Democrat'
  AND driver.Age >= 38
  AND driver.Home_city = 'East Hartford'
  AND school.Type = 'private college'

records.question: Which drivers are assigned to school buses that are exactly full-time?

JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id

FROM driver

records.question: Which drivers are exactly 45 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
WHERE driver.age = 45
records.pred_sql: SELECT Driver_ID FROM driver WHERE Age = 45

records.question: Which drivers aged at least 46 have been working exactly 3 years as full-time school bus drivers?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
WHERE school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND school_bus.years_working = 3 AND driver.age >= 46

  AND school_bus.If_full_time = 1

records.question: Which drivers named Dan Carter are at most 30 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
WHERE driver.age <= 30 AND driver.name = 'Dan Carter'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Driver_ID FROM driver WHERE Name = 'Dan Carter' AND Age <= 30

records.question: Which drivers named Jason Rojas from East Hartford, who are at most 38 years old, drive full-time school buses and have been working those buses for at most 2 years?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
WHERE driver.name = 'Jason Rojas' AND driver.home_city = 'East Hartford' AND school_bus.years_working <= 2 AND driver.age <= 38 AND school_bus.if_full_time = 'T'

WHERE driver.Name = 'Jason Rojas'

  AND school_bus.If_full_time = 1
  AND school_bus.Years_Working <= 2

records.question: Which drivers named Jason Rojas, aged at most 38 and living in East Hartford, have worked no more than 2 years driving school buses for schools where the type is Private?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
JOIN school ON school_bus.school_id = school.school_id
WHERE school_bus.years_working <= 2 AND school.type = 'Private' AND driver.name = 'Jason Rojas' AND driver.home_city = 'East Hartford' AND driver.age <= 38
records.pred_sql:
SELECT d.Driver_ID
FROM driver d
JOIN school_bus sb ON d.Driver_ID = sb.Driver_ID
JOIN school s ON sb.School_ID = s.School_ID
WHERE d.Name = 'Jason Rojas'
  AND d.Age <= 38
  AND d.Home_city = 'East Hartford'
  AND s.Type = 'Private'
  AND sb.Years_Working <= 2
